agent.title: Agent
agent.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete agent "{name}"?
agent.fillNameAndCode: Please fill in name and code
agent.codeFormatError: Code must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers and underscores

mode.autonomousDesc: Agent automatically decomposes and executes tasks
mode.dialogFlowDesc: Interact with users following predefined workflow

agent.runModeTooltip: Autonomous Mode: Agent automatically understands user intent and responds, suitable for general Q&A; Dialog Flow Mode: Interacts with users following predefined workflow steps, suitable for fixed process scenarios
agent.relatedWorkflowTooltip: Select a published workflow. In dialog flow mode, the agent will interact with users following the workflow steps
agent.dialogFlowHint: Dialog flow mode requires a linked workflow. The workflow can use interactive nodes like Q&A, choice, etc.
agent.conversationMemoryTooltip: When enabled, LLM nodes in the workflow can access conversation history for more coherent responses
agent.memoryWindowTooltip: LLM nodes can access the last N rounds of conversation history. Larger values mean longer memory but more token consumption

persona.title: Persona
persona.roleTooltip: Define the core identity and responsibilities of the agent, e.g. 'You are a professional data analyst'. This affects the AI's response style and expertise
persona.rolePlaceholder: e.g. You are a professional data analyst, skilled at handling complex data problems...
persona.personalityTooltip: Set personality traits like 'rigorous', 'friendly', 'humorous', etc. to influence the tone and style of responses
persona.personalityPlaceholder: Enter personality trait, press Enter to add
persona.skillsTooltip: List the agent's expertise areas like 'data analysis', 'code review', etc. to help AI understand its capability boundaries
persona.skillsPlaceholder: Enter skill, press Enter to add
persona.constraintsTooltip: Set rules the agent must follow, like 'no political topics', 'answers must be fact-based', etc. to prevent AI from overstepping
persona.constraintsPlaceholder: Enter constraint, press Enter to add
persona.backgroundTooltip: Provide detailed background info like company, business domain, target audience, etc. to help AI better understand the business context

prompt.title: System Prompt
prompt.tooltip: Direct instruction text for AI, higher priority than persona config. Leave empty to auto-generate from persona
prompt.placeholder: Write system prompt directly, or leave empty to auto-generate from persona...

model.title: Model Config
model.label: Model
model.tooltip: Select the LLM for the agent. Different models vary in capability, speed, and cost
model.temperatureTooltip: Controls response randomness. Lower values give more stable responses, higher values are more creative but may be inaccurate. Recommended: strict 0.1~0.3, general 0.5~0.7, creative 0.8~1.2
model.maxTokenTooltip: Maximum output length per response (in tokens). ~1 token ≈ 4 English characters. Larger values allow longer responses but cost more
model.maxIterationsTooltip: Maximum think-act cycles per conversation. Prevents infinite loops. Usually 5~10 is sufficient
model.streamingTooltip: When enabled, AI responses stream character by character for a smoother experience

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.label: Linked Knowledge Bases
knowledgeBase.hint: After selecting knowledge bases, relevant content will be automatically retrieved as context for each question, improving answer accuracy
knowledgeBase.retrievalModeTooltip: Hybrid: Uses both semantic vectors and keyword matching, best for most scenarios; Vector: Based on semantic similarity, good at understanding synonyms; Full-text: Based on exact keyword matching, good for technical terms
knowledgeBase.topKTooltip: Number of most relevant segments returned per retrieval. Larger values provide richer context but may introduce noise. Recommended 3~5
knowledgeBase.scoreThresholdTooltip: Only return results above this similarity threshold. Higher values mean more precise but may miss relevant content. Recommended 0.5~0.7

welcome.title: Welcome Message
welcome.tooltip: Auto-displayed greeting when users first enter the conversation. Can introduce agent capabilities or guide users

suggestions.title: Suggested Questions
suggestions.hint: Suggested questions are shown at the start of conversation to help users get started quickly
suggestions.inputPlaceholder: Enter suggested question, press Enter to add
suggestions.empty: No suggested questions. Add some to help users get started

chatPanel.sendToStart: Send a message to start conversation
chatPanel.publishFirst: Please publish the agent before chatting
chatPanel.designPanelHint: Please confirm or edit the design in the right panel

knowledge.annotationReplyTip: When enabled, if user question matches an annotation above the threshold, the annotation answer is returned directly without calling LLM. Zero token cost, faster response. Falls back to normal RAG when no match.
knowledge.annotationThresholdTip: Directly return annotation answer when similarity exceeds this threshold. Recommend 0.9+ to avoid false matches.

conversation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this conversation?

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.logoSourcePlaceholder: Please enter logo image URL or upload

systemSummary.title: System Created Successfully
systemSummary.subtitle: Here are the modules AI created for you

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this knowledge base? All documents and segments will be permanently lost.
knowledge.name: Name

document.title: Document Management
document.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this document?
document.reindexAllConfirm: Are you sure to reindex all documents? This may take a while.
document.uploadPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag files, supports PDF, Word, TXT, Markdown, etc.

segment.title: Segment Management
segment.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this segment?

annotation.title: Annotations
annotation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this annotation?
annotation.question: Question

retrieval.title: Retrieval Test
retrieval.invalidMetadataFilter: Invalid metadata filter format, please enter valid JSON

chunkPreview.title: Chunk Preview
chunkPreview.selectFile: Please select a file to preview chunking
chunkPreview.noFileId: This document has no associated file

settings.title: Knowledge Base Settings
settings.embeddingModelChangeWarning: Changing the embedding model will make existing vectors incompatible. All documents need to be re-indexed. Save and re-index?

indexingTechniqueHint.high_quality: Vector indexing + keyword extraction, best retrieval quality

knowledge.retrievalWeightHint: Weight coefficient for multi-KB retrieval (0.1-10.0), higher value ranks results higher
knowledge.processRulesHint: Text cleaning rules before document indexing
knowledge.embeddingModelTooltip: Model for converting text to vectors, directly affects semantic search quality. Different models support different languages and dimensions
knowledge.embeddingModelSettingsTooltip: Model for converting text to vectors, directly affects semantic search quality. Documents need to be re-indexed after changing the model
knowledge.chunkStrategyTooltip: Document chunking strategy. auto: automatically select best strategy; recursive: recursive splitting, versatile; markdown: split by headings; fixed: fixed length; sentence: by sentence; qa: AI auto-split into Q&A pairs
knowledge.chunkStrategySettingsTooltip: Document chunking strategy. auto: auto select; recursive: recursive splitting; markdown: split by headings; fixed: fixed length; sentence: by sentence; qa: AI split into Q&A pairs
knowledge.indexingTechniqueTooltip: High quality: uses Embedding vectorization, high retrieval accuracy but resource-intensive; Economy: keyword-only indexing, low resource usage but limited accuracy
knowledge.retrievalModeTooltip: Hybrid: uses both semantic vectors and keyword matching, recommended for most scenarios; Vector: based on semantic similarity; Full-text: based on exact keyword matching
knowledge.chunkSizeTooltip: Maximum characters per document chunk. Larger chunks preserve more context but may introduce noise, smaller chunks are more precise but may lose context. Recommended: 300~800
knowledge.chunkSizeSettingsTooltip: Maximum characters per chunk, larger preserves more context but may introduce noise. Recommended: 300~800
knowledge.chunkOverlapTooltip: Overlapping characters between adjacent chunks to ensure information at chunk boundaries is not lost. Recommended: 10%~20% of chunk size
knowledge.chunkOverlapSettingsTooltip: Overlapping characters between adjacent chunks to preserve boundary information. Recommended: 10%~20% of chunk size
knowledge.globalVisibleTooltip: When enabled, all applications can use this knowledge base; otherwise only the current application
knowledge.dimensionsTooltip: Embedding vector dimensions, must match the selected Embedding model. Higher dimensions provide richer semantic representation but increase storage and computation costs
knowledge.topKTooltip: Number of most relevant segments returned per retrieval. Higher values provide richer context but may introduce noise. Recommended: 3~5
knowledge.scoreThresholdTooltip: Only return results with similarity above this threshold. Higher values mean more precise matches but may miss relevant content. Recommended: 0.5~0.7
knowledge.rerankTooltip: When enabled, performs secondary ranking on initial retrieval results, significantly improving accuracy but adding latency and cost
knowledge.retrievalWeightTooltip: Weight coefficient for this knowledge base in multi-KB retrieval. Higher values rank this KB's results higher
knowledge.processRulesTooltip: Text cleaning rules before document indexing. Removes extra spaces, URLs, emails and other irrelevant content to improve retrieval quality

knowledgeNode.queryPlaceholder: Enter query text or use variable reference
knowledgeNode.queryHint: Leave empty to use user input, supports {{variable}} references
knowledgeNode.rerankHint: Use Rerank model to reorder results after retrieval for better relevance
knowledgeNode.noRerankModel: No Rerank model configured, please add one in Model Management
knowledgeNode.resultsArrayDesc: Array of retrieval results with segment_id, content, score, etc.
knowledgeNode.contextTextDesc: Concatenated context text, ready for LLM node prompts

message.label: Message Node

confirm.label: Confirm Node
confirm.contentPlaceholder: Enter content for user confirmation, supports variables like {{variable}}
confirm.contentHint: Workflow will pause, waiting for user to click confirm or cancel
confirm.outputHint: User confirm returns true, cancel returns false
confirm.smartIntentHint:
When user inputs text (instead of clicking buttons), use LLM to determine user intent.
By default, keyword matching is used (e.g. "ok", "yes" for confirm, "no", "cancel" for cancel).
confirm.intentModelHint: When keyword matching fails, use this model for intent recognition

merge.label: Merge
merge.objectDesc: Merge branch results into object, keyed by branch ID
merge.firstDesc: Take only the first completed branch result
merge.usageTip1: Merge node waits for all parallel branches to complete
merge.usageTip2: Merged results are stored in the output variable

parallel.label: Parallel Branch
parallel.title: Parallel Branches
parallel.branchHint: All branches execute simultaneously, converging at the merge node
parallel.usageTip1: Connect each branch output to different nodes
parallel.usageTip2: All branches must connect to the same merge node
parallel.usageTip3: Nodes within branches execute in parallel

start.userInputDesc: User input from the chat box, automatically passed to this variable

intent.modelHint: Select LLM model for analyzing user intent

intent.name: Name
intent.intentDescPlaceholder: Intent description (e.g.: User wants to consult product info)
intent.exampleSentences: Example sentences (helps AI recognize more accurately)

intent.confidenceHint: Below this threshold will go to OTHER branch

loop.label: Loop
loop.arrayVarHint: Array variable to iterate, supports {{NodeID.key}} format or direct JSON array
loop.addConditionHint: Click "Add Condition" to set loop continuation conditions
loop.maxIterationsHint: Prevent infinite loops, force stop after this count

loop.loopBodyHint1: In loop body you can use

subflow.label: Subflow
subflow.varMappingHint1: Subflow variable name: variable name used in subflow
subflow.varMappingHint2: Main flow variable value: value passed from main flow (select variable)
subflow.resultVarHint: Enter variable names to pass back from subflow (variables produced inside subflow)
subflow.resultVarSavedHint: Complete subflow result stored in this variable, access via {template}
subflow.maxNestDepthHint: Prevent infinite recursion, max 5 levels by default
subflow.showSubflowMessagesHint: When enabled, message nodes in subflow will display in main flow chat
subflow.forwardInteractiveHint: When enabled, Q&A, choice, confirm nodes in subflow will display in main flow
subflow.usageTip1: Subflow must be a published workflow
subflow.usageTip2: Subflow inherits main flow user context
subflow.usageTip3: Pass data between main flow and subflow via variable passing
subflow.usageTip4: After subflow completes, results stored in specified variable
subflow.usageTip5: Supports nested subflow calls, but avoid circular dependencies

formDbDesign.subFieldListPlaceholder: Enter sub table field list or use variable
formDbDesign.subTableNameHint: Database table name for sub table

formDbDesign.tableNameHint: Database table name, e.g.: employee, order_info
